title: ME3 9SG, OCL Regeneration Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/SP3401PP/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document and for:   Operator name: OCL Regeneration Limited Installation name: Medway Recycling Centre Permit number: EPR/SP3401PP/A001  "
